notes: Scenarios: income and expense events now support Frequency (Once/Monthly/Yearly) and an optional End month. Monthly recurring (e.g. rental income) and yearly recurring (e.g. bonus) both grow by salary growth rate annually. Engine's expandOneOff extended to handle all three frequencies. Schema v9 backfills frequency from legacy 'repeat' boolean. Wizard one-off rows remain unchanged (backward-compatible via migration).
